title: Cofense (Deprecated)
description:
Cofense is a leading provider of phishing threat intelligence and incident response solutions. This connector imports phishing-related threat intelligence from the Cofense platform into OpenCTI.

⚠️ This connector is deprecated and will no longer be maintained.
short_description: Imports phishing threat intelligence from the Cofense platform into OpenCTI. ⚠️ Deprecated.
